items.title: The ICE Expansion Won't Happen in the Dark
items.description: People have a right to know who their neighbors are, especially when it's ICE.

items.title: I Loved My OpenClaw AI Agent—Until It Turned on Me
items.description: I used the viral AI helper to order groceries, sort emails, and negotiate deals. Then it decided to scam me.

items.title: Jeffrey Epstein Advised an Elon Musk Associate on Taking Tesla Private
items.description: The financier recommended adding Margaret Thatcher to Tesla’s board, even though she had been dead for five years.

items.title: Our Favorite Upgraded Power Bank Is $30 Off
items.description: This supercharged Anker pack can keep all your devices topped up.

items.title: CBP Signs Clearview AI Deal to Use Face Recognition for ‘Tactical Targeting’
items.description: US Border Patrol intelligence units will gain access to a face recognition tool built on billions of images scraped from the internet.
